payment.title: Payment Settings
payment.stripeDescription: Credit/Debit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay
payment.paypalDescription: PayPal balance, card, and Pay Later
payment.paymentConfigComingSoon: Payment provider configuration will be available in the next update. You can set up your payment provider manually in the meantime.
payment.learnMoreProviders: Click to learn more about each provider
payment.setupRecommendationsDesc: Secure and scalable payment gateway integration with seamless checkout, multi-payment support, and real-time transaction management.
payment.globalSaaSText: Use Stripe as primary + Lemon Squeezy for tax compliance, or Stripe with tax integration.
payment.indiaAsiaText: Use Razorpay as primary for local payments + Stripe for international cards.
payment.simpleSubscriptionText: Use Lemon Squeezy (simplest setup, global tax handling) or Stripe (more control).
payment.existingBusinessText: Check if you already have Stripe or PayPal configured for seamless integration.
payment.webhookConfigDesc: Reliable webhook configuration for real-time event tracking, automated workflows, and seamless third-party system integrations.
payment.afterSetup: After setting up your payment provider, you'll need to configure webhooks for real-time transaction updates.
payment.exampleWebhookUrl: Example Webhook URL (replace with your domain)
payment.configureUrl: Configure this URL in your payment provider's dashboard to receive webhook events for payment status changes, refunds, and subscriptions.

email.whatDoesDesc: Connects to your SMTP server and sends an actual test email to verify everything works end-to-end.

dashboard.perfMetricsSubtitle: Core Web Vitals analyzed during current page generation cycle
dashboard.fcpDesc: FCP marks the time at which the first text or image is painted.
dashboard.siDesc: Speed Index shows how quickly the contents of a page are visibly populated.
dashboard.lcpDesc: LCP marks the time at which the main content of a page has likely loaded.
dashboard.tbtDesc: Sum of all time periods between FCP and Time to Interactive.
dashboard.clsDesc: CLS measures the movement of visible elements in the viewport.
dashboard.healthDesc: Historical trends and consistency records for the monitored environment
dashboard.opportunitiesDesc: Actionable advice to accelerate page loading and performance
